title: Linear-Time String Search and Prefix Structure · Structure Brief: String Adversaries
summary: Scan large logs for many repeated patterns without repeated restart work. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 string adversaries increment in a verified prefix-based matching engine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Construct repeated-prefix, Unicode, empty-pattern, and collision-heavy cases.
Extend trie state with failure transitions for multi-pattern matching.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
